# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [0.1.7] - 2026-01-21

### Features

- Project setups for mono
- Add configuration system with environment loading
- Add YAML configuration file support
- Add basic server

### Miscellaneous Tasks

- Release v0.1.1
- Fix release
- Release v0.1.2
- Release v0.1.3
